changeSet.author: kengine
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS knowledge CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kengine
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE ingestion_documents DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS version; ALTER TABLE knowledge.knowledge_ingestion_process DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS version;

changeSet.author: kengine
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE document_knowledge DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS overall_architecture, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_components, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_apis, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_workflows, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_capabilities, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_roles, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_terms, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_policies, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS identified_decisions;
